data.title: Dow up, Nasdaq down, S&P 500 falls. Oracle sinks on earnings, ATI and Penumbra rise. Overall mixed day in stock market.
data.description: Today in the stock market, the Dow Jones index saw an increase, while the Nasdaq and S&P 500 experienced a decline. AI stock Oracle notably plummeted following its earnings report. The live coverage highlighted that ATI and Penumbra showed significant growth amidst the mixed market trends. The Dow saw a rise of [insert numeric value] points, while the Nasdaq and S&P 500 recorded [insert numeric value] and [insert numeric value] point decreases, respectively. Oracle stocks dropped by [insert numeric value]%. Investor's Business Daily provided in-depth coverage of these market movements.

data.title: Retail investors are optimistic about the stock market's future, with 44.6% believing stocks will rise and 30.6% expecting declines.
data.description: Retail investors in the U.S. are increasingly optimistic about the stock market's prospects, as per the latest survey by the American Association of Individual Investors. The survey shows that 44.6% of respondents expect stocks to rise in the next six months, a slight increase from the previous week and significantly higher than the long-term average of 37.5%. Bearish sentiment decreased to 30.6%, falling below the historical average of 31% for only the second time in the past 46 weeks. Neutral sentiment dropped to 24.8%, remaining below the long-term average. The bull-bear spread widened to 14 percentage points, reflecting a market tilted towards risk-on sentiment. Overall, confidence seems steady on Main Street despite uncertainties surrounding Fed policy.

data.title: FHLBank Pittsburgh awards $90.2 million in 2025 for over 1,800 affordable homes through grants and funding.
data.description: In Pittsburgh, FHLBank has allocated over $90 million in funding for the year 2025 to assist in financing around 1,800 affordable homes.

data.title: Bitcoin price drops as experts believe Fed’s rate cut was expected, citing risks like inflation and upcoming election cycle.
data.description: Financial analysts have indicated that the recent Federal Reserve rate cut was widely anticipated, leading to a decrease in Bitcoin value. Concerns surrounding persistent inflation and the upcoming 2026 elections have also contributed to the current market situation.

data.title: Swissbit introduces HID Seos Token in iShield Key 2 portfolio for enhanced security, supporting MIFARE DESFire EV3.
data.description: A company based in Westford, Mass, Swissbit, has announced the expansion of its range of multi-application security keys. The iShield Key 2 will now include a new variant that incorporates HID Seos, a popular credential technology for physical access control. This addition complements the existing support for MIFARE DESFire EV3, thereby providing customers with a versatile token that combines digital authentication capabilities. Swissbit's decision to incorporate HID Seos aligns with its strategy to offer comprehensive security solutions, solidifying its position as a key player in this industry. With these advancements, Swissbit aims to cater to a broader market segment and further strengthen its global footprint.

data.title: 5G High-Frequency PCB market outlook to 2031; shift from 4-16 layer to 16-32 layer PCBs. Key players: Nippon Mektron, Samsung Electro-Mechanics, Young Poong Electronics, Daeduck, Ibiden, and others.
data.description: In Dublin, the market for 5G high-frequency PCBs is experiencing significant advancements. The sector has seen a transition from 4-16 layer PCBs to 16-32 layer PCBs to accommodate the growing complexity in 5G communication systems. This shift is driven by the demand for improved signal integrity, bandwidth, and miniaturization in PCB design. The "Technology Landscape, Trends and Opportunities in 5G High Frequency PCB Market" report, now available on ResearchAndMarkets.com, provides insights into this evolving market.

data.title: Storage Post Self Storage sponsors the 2025 Bad Boy Mowers Pinstripe Bowl at Yankee Stadium, featuring top teams from ACC and Big Ten.
data.description: A self-storage company, Storage Post, has confirmed its sponsorship of the 2025 Bad Boy Mowers Pinstripe Bowl happening at Yankee Stadium on December 27 at noon. This bowl game will showcase prominent teams from the ACC and Big Ten, namely Clemson University and Penn State University, and signifies the 15th installment of the event. By supporting this renowned New York tradition, Storage Post demonstrates its dedication to the community and endeavor to encourage participation and backing for local events.

data.title: Luxury home builder Toll Brothers to open Wilder Ranch community in Westminster, Colorado in early 2026, with 4 collections.
data.description: In Westminster, Colorado, Toll Brothers, Inc. (NYSE:TOL) revealed on Dec. 11, 2025, that Wilder Ranch, its latest community, is set to launch soon. As the top builder of luxury homes in the U.S., Toll Brothers will introduce four distinct luxury collections comprising townhomes, duets, and single-family homes in this exclusive resort-style community. The site preparation is currently in progress, with sales expected to commence in early 2026.

data.title: Manchester United posts Q1 fiscal 2026 results: net sales at 140.3 million pounds, down from 143.1 million, net losses widen.
data.description: Manchester United Ltd. (NYSE: MANU) released its first-quarter fiscal 2026 results, indicating a decline in revenue but a significant improvement in operating profit. The report highlighted the positive impacts of recent cost-saving measures and restructuring, despite a widening net loss. Quarterly net sales stood at 140.3 million pounds ($189.28 million), down from 143.1 million pounds compared to the previous year and missing the estimated $214.99 million. The total revenue experienced a 2% decrease. Commercial revenue also decreased by 1.3% year-on-year due to shifts in commercial partnerships. Matchday revenue saw a drop as well. For more details, refer to the full article on Benzinga.com.

data.title: GenAI and agentic AI transforming insurance industry with speed, pricing, accuracy. ISG reports. #Insurance #AI
data.description: Insurers in Stamford, Conn. are utilizing GenAI and agentic AI in the majority of their operations to gain a competitive advantage in various areas such as speed, pricing, accuracy, and enhancing customer experience, according to ISG.

data.title: Anything acquires "anything.com" for $2M, enabling users to create apps, marking a shift in software ownership.
data.description: In San Francisco, Anything, an AI platform enabling the creation of mobile and web apps, has revealed the acquisition of the domain “anything.com” for $2 million. This strategic move aligns with Anything’s mission to democratize software development, emphasizing that app creation is no longer limited to developers but accessible to all individuals seeking solutions. The company has also introduced a new functionality enabling users to buy and link domains through Anything while developing applications. This acquisition signifies a significant step in Anything’s goal of making app development more inclusive and user-friendly.

data.title: Parafin partners with Kajabi to launch Kajabi Capital, providing entrepreneurs with fast and flexible financing. 81% of small businesses impacted.
data.description: In San Francisco, Parafin, a prominent player in embedded financing, has unveiled a partnership with expert economy platform, Kajabi, to introduce Kajabi Capital. This newly launched program offers fast and adaptable financing to the network of entrepreneurs associated with Kajabi. The collaboration underscores Kajabi's dedication towards creating an extensive, all-encompassing platform for creators to capitalize on their skills and expand their enterprises. A notable 81% of small b...

data.title: Keysight and KT SAT completed the first multi-orbit NTN handover between GEO and LEO, demonstrating session continuity.
data.description: In Santa Rosa, California, a recent live demonstration showcased the seamless transition from a geostationary earth orbit to a simulated low Earth orbit connection. This multi-orbit proof-of-concept displayed session continuity, emphasizing the feasibility of this technology. The demonstration highlighted the potential for enhanced communication capabilities by linking these two distinct orbits. The successful event underscored the possibility of improved connectivity in space-related operations.

data.title: IP Infusion helps eww ITandTEL upgrade MPLS backbone to 400G using OcNOS-SP-PLUS, replacing 100G.
data.description: In Santa Clara, California, IP Infusion, a prominent provider of open networking software solutions, revealed today that eww ITandTEL, a leading IT and telecommunications service provider in Austria, has enhanced its MPLS backbone utilizing IP Infusion’s OcNOS-SP-PLUS. This upgrade elevates the operator from 100G to a modernized 400G IP over DWDM architecture. boasting over 30 years of expertise in managing secure data centers and a vast fiber infrastructure.

data.title: Solifi partners with Liventus & Consult Disrupt to enhance client implementation, automation, & cloud migration capabilities.
data.description: Solifi has joined forces with Liventus to offer their customers enhanced development and operational support, with a focus on accelerating go-live processes, increasing automation capabilities, and facilitating seamless transitions to cloud technologies. The collaboration, unveiled on December 11, 2025 in Minneapolis, brings together decades of combined expertise to benefit Solifi's customers in achieving quicker implementation timelines and smoother transitions to cloud platforms.

data.title: Vishay's SGTPL-28 series of space-grade planar transformers wins 2025 AspenCore EE Awards Asia Award for discrete products.
data.description: Durable and compact devices have been acknowledged in the discrete product category. These innovative products are commended for their robustness and space-saving capabilities.

data.title: HII reveals 30% completion of ROMULUS USV prototype at Breaux Bros, on track for Q4 2026 sea trials.
data.description: In Loreauville, Louisiana, on December 11, 2025, executives from HII (NYSE: HII) visited Breaux Brothers Enterprises to inspect the progress of constructing a prototype of ROMULUS, the company's latest unmanned surface vessel (USV). The construction has reached 30% completion, with the vessel expected to undergo sea trials in the fourth quarter of 2026.

data.title: Perini Management Services, Inc. wins $35.8M contract for Tool and Die Facility at Iowa Army Ammunition Plant.
data.description: In FRAMINGHAM, Mass., Tutor Perini Corporation (NYSE: TPC) revealed that its subsidiary, Perini Management Services, Inc. (PMSI), has secured a significant contract worth around $35.8 million from the U.S. Army Corps of Engineers, Omaha District. This deal is specifically for the development of a fresh Tool and Die Facility at the Iowa Army Ammunition Plant in Middletown, IA. The upcoming Tool and Die facility project is anticipated to bring valuable advancements to the site.

data.title: Xoma stock plunges as partner Rezolute halts hyperinsulinism drug after Phase 3 flop. Market reacts negatively.
data.description: On Thursday, Xoma's stock experienced a sharp decline following the decision by its partner, Rezolute, to discontinue the development of a hyperinsulinism treatment due to its failure in Phase 3 trials. This news led to a significant drop in Xoma's stock value. The joint venture's decision to halt the drug's development has had a substantial impact on both companies, with Rezolute also facing repercussions from the failed medication. The unsuccessful Phase 3 testing resulted in a negative outcome for the hyperinsulinism treatment, causing a ripple effect in the stock market.

data.title: Strategy letter to MSCI mentions Trump 11 times, claims index exclusion is anti-Trump, anti-Bitcoin.
data.description: A letter from Strategy to MSCI has emphasized President Trump and his administration 11 times. Strategy believes that the exclusion from the index is against Trump and Bitcoin, according to Investor's Business Daily.
